data.title: Server Infrastructure
data.description: Instagram's server architecture is designed to handle high-volume traffic and data.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Load Balancers, CDN, and Cloud Service Providers

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Storage and retrieval of vast amounts of user data and media.
data.technical_spec: NoSQL databases with sharding for scalability

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Adoption of microservices for various functionalities to optimize performance.

data.title: Third-party Integrations
data.description: Integration with third-party services for extended functionalities.
data.technical_spec: APIs and SDKs to connect with external services like payment gateways

data.title: Client-Server Communication
data.description: Efficient data exchange between client applications and servers.
data.technical_spec: HTTP/2, JSON for APIs, WebSocket for real-time updates
